text: Good service provider and very good about taking feedback and correcting the few mistakes that do occur.

All around a great data entry service. 8-9 out of 10 reports are fairly flawless and I've got pretty extensive instructions to be followed for every report. 4 stars only because every now and then I'll get a report where the instructions were seemingly ignored. They will, however, fix this if you bring it up to them after you find the problem.
Great service, saves me at the least 30 mins per report. Makes a big difference when you write 40-60 reports a month.
Anytime I work with you I am extremely happy with with your service. I dont use you as much as I use to because I hired a full time assistant. Thank you for all your help!

They are very helpful and knowledgeable in data entry. We've been using them for years. They save me time and money. The more you use them, the more you get to know their style and they know yours. If there are any issues, they are very responsive.
I am very satisfied with the typed reports we receive from ieIMPACT. Rarely a mistake which is better than most typists I've used in the past.
Mostly good. On occasion some of the data entry people tend to unnecessarily remove existing comments from the reports. but for the most part everything is good.
Very happy with the quality of the service and integrity of the report. Attention to detail and good quality data entry

IE has saved countless hours of data entry in my reports and allowed me to increase the number of reports I can handle. They are very skilled at what they do and and very mindful of feedback to improve on future reports. I highly recommend IE Impact!

Possibly a little more consistency with report writers in regards to reports. some are accurate and some are not. Also turn times. in regards to 6hr and 12hr reports. I personally choose these for a reason and its mostly for client deadlines. When a 6hr time takes 8hrs+ the refund of a few dollars doesnt compare to the client getting angry and possibly not using me anymore
Thank you for all the great service, I appreciate the hard work and detailed files you assist my company with daily. Keep up the great work.
I am very happy with the service provided by IE Impact -- they have cut my data entry/typing time considerably!

For the most part the reports you are producing are excellent. There are a few inconsistencies I get like when I ask that the search criteria in the MC be filled out and it isn't or when you use L-shape or Rectangular as a style just put ranch. Other than that I have been very pleased.
Thanks for the great service!!! I get to focus on appraising and not data entry. I consider ieIMPACT a part of my company.
For the most part your reports are good. Sometimes I get one with limited attention to detail. I appreciate your help on some very difficult assignments. Thank you.
This is a great service for busy appraisers who want to increase their productivity. Using IE Impact was the best move I made in my career.
These guys are a lifesaver. I really like that your appraisal business is now operating 24/7 with reports being typed while you are not working.
Very pleased. 95% of the time the order is great. When I see problems it is usually with the sales comp data entered.
ieImpact is awesome! I can do my inspections during the day, and have multiple reports assembled and typed while I sleep, ready for my review and final analysis.
Great customer service! This service saves me time on completing my reports. I highly recommend ieImpact. Jeff S.

The IE Impact staff is trainable, and performs well completed assignments on time a majority of the time. Mistakes are minimal, and rarely repeated once brought to their attention. I have been using the services of IE Impact for more than a year with good results.

We have been so pleased with ieIMPACT and their data entry services! Their ability to provide turnaround on appraisal data entry has allowed us to meet the demands of our clients in this fast-paced real estate market.

The service provided by ieImpact is amazing. It really helps save me time in my reports. They do a really good job with the data entry and once you get the report back you just have minor things to do to complete the report.
Overall, the service is really good. There are times where the reports will come back that are half completed or completely wrong information in them. So that part can be improved.
You have been doing a wonderful job. I know there has been many people fallen ill this last month. My Prayers are with you all. You are quite a team.

ieImpact saves me so much time, they have never failed my timelines and have always found a way to get my files to me. Covid has hit hard and they were able to pivot and keep us going! Love, love, love

Mainly very good and timely service. There are a few times where rush orders are not completed within the 6 hour window, this is an issue when work needs to be submitted in a timely manner. Other than that I am generally happy with the service. Thank you!
The reports get done. Many items in notes are ignored. For the most part more pros than cons. Reasonably priced. I like knowing the report will be back to me in the timeline chosen.
The sketches are excellent and worth every part of the fee for saving me the time of completing complex sketches.

Sorry People have been Very Busy. Dont always have the time to get back Individually. Would Like to. OVERALL Good, I've seen A few with Missing Names on the top of Page 1. LOT Sizleft blank a couple of times.
if they would just put in the right E&O and license that are on file then I would be happy, the work is really helpful and I do appreciate the help
Great work guys. I know these are tough times over there, and you're hard work is appreciated. JD Jarrod Denney
I think your data entry service is very, very good. Once I got the process dialed in with your staff, the past years have be great.

I used to pay a local individual to assist in completing my data entry portion of reports, and although I do not use the full capability of ieImpact, the data entry portion of comp data has been of great savings.
Lots of continual mistakes regarding prior sales and amenities such as pools, shops, etc. Perhaps I need to do a better job of instructions.
You guys save me a lot of time. I do wish that there was more consistency with the data input according to my instructions.

Its is a great service providing this for my business. I cannot imagine how many hours i have saved on IeImpact saving me time. If there was something higher than 5 stars, they would definitely get it.
I could not do all the work I receive it wasn't for your wonderful company! I am praying for your country.

Pros: Overall a good service for the price. I have increased my productivity and producing more work and opportunities. Cons: Service has trouble delivering within by the time order ie 6 hours,12 hours etc. However if they miss the deadline, they will credit back $$ - usually the difference between the services ie 6-12 hours $2/$3. I send with sufficient time before my due date with the client. Have to review the work carefully - sometimes there are errors. Best thing is to provide very specific instructions of how the reports should be compile, photos, maps etc. Overall very good for the cost -
Another great job, as I get better of explaining how I like the reports they get even better at putting them together and I have only done 2 so far, you cant beet this service.
Good job, comparable #1 one though I do see a document # but the report showed as n/a other than that good job. Thanks

I am just getting started with the system. It is daunting at the beginning but I now think I am ready to send my first order. John knows it inside and out and has helped me get to this point. I can not wait to see the results.
Very good. There was a lot of data needed in a short of time. It was a difficult drawing. You performed well.
For using the first time there were a couple things that were no big deal and inspected but overall this was great! The less I do helps me extremely!

I love working with IE Impact. They save me hours of typing with each report. They are thorough and accurate, timely and affordable. I have more free time since I have started using their service. The prep work to send the data and template file always assures you that you have everything in your work file and that you are USPAP compliant with your record keeping.

I love how this company has helped me with all of my reports. They do an excellent job! It has allowed me to get more work out quicker and increase my volume. I don't know what I would do without them. Thanks so much! I love you guys. Keep up the great work John is always right there to help if you need it!

I appreciate the data entry support as it allows me to focus on analysis more and less on data entry. When I am looking at data all day, its good to know I can have the data transferred onto my report, and keep moving, saving me time and energy. Thank you.
I would say to the appraiser don't get too excited they are ok but don't expect too much. They make a lot of simple mistakes all the time but its still worth most of the time.

I could not be more pleased with this service. Saves me at least 90 minutes minimum per report. I spend approximately 30-45 minutes to do a final review and write up my comments depending on the level of complexity.
We are very happy with this service. ieIMPACT allows us to keep pace with our high volume of appraisals. The company always asks for feedback and strives to be accurate and consumer friendly.
